author: machdragon
name: XSA + Overtone Init + EMA 0.997
blurb: PR #287 base (SOTA val_bpb=1.1271) with Overtone embedding init added. Overtone reshapes tok_emb singular values to power-law decay for better int6 quantization. No KURE, R2, tanh reparam, or TTT — clean minimal delta over proven SOTA.
notes: Awaiting Modal 8xH100 validation runs. Run plan: A=baseline, B=12L, C/D=EMA sweep, E=3-seed validation.
